audit_items.proof_trace: `bid()` unconditionally calls `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)` at L429 before any asset transfer, and `_getAssetOutAmount(..., true)` at L442 which internally calls `_getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, true)` at L798. `_getAssetPrice` with `withValidation=true` reverts on zero price (`ZeroFeedData`) and stale price (`StaleFeedData`), so both asset prices in the bid flow are fully protected.
